title: La portatrice di pane
writer: Xavier de Montépin, Maurice Cloche, Yves Mirande
actors: Vivi Gioi, Carlo Ninchi, Jean Tissier
plot: Wrongly accused of having killed her boss and set fire to the factory she worked in, Jeanne Fortier, a young window, is given a life sentence. Twenty years later, She escapes from prison, adopts a new identity, determined to clear...
